creator: horikawa@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
PKGNAME and DISTNAME are changed, since ja-man-doc-X.Y.tgz
	contains Japanese manuals for branch X.Y and doc/japanese/man
	contains manuals for 3.0 branch.

	pkg/MESSAGE is changed, since japanese/man is now ja-man-1.1g.

Fix: apply following patch with `% patch -p1' in japanese/man-doc
	directory.
How-To-Repeat: 
	<Code/input/activities to reproduce the problem (multiple lines)>
